# Diagram: entity_core/entity_service/entity_service_scripts/backfill_completed_to_delivered_lifecycles.py


> Auto-generated by Obscura crawlers

## Diagram 1

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([Start]) --> GetSecret[/"SECRETS.get_secret(ENTITY_DATABASE)"/]
    GetSecret --> OpenConn[/"fv.db.get_connection(config, DB_APP_NAME='backfill_entity_location_ids', autocommit=True)"/]
    OpenConn --> WithCursor[/"fv.db.get_cursor(conn) -> cursor"/]
    WithCursor --> InitVars[/"res = True; updated = 0"/]
    InitVars --> CountQuery[/"cursor.execute('select count(*) from entity where state = ''Completed''') -> count = cursor.fetchone().count"/]
    CountQuery --> Loop{res ?}
    Loop -->|True| Upsert[/"Execute upsert CTE: update entity -> insert into datamod.TEMP_STATE_TABLE"/]
    Upsert --> UpsertFetch[/"res = cursor.fetchone() (after upsert)"/]
    UpsertFetch --> Uplete[/"Execute uplete: update entity.state_change_ts from TEMP_STATE_TABLE -> delete from TEMP_STATE_TABLE"/]
    Uplete --> UpleteFetch[/"res = cursor.fetchone() (after uplete)"/]
    UpleteFetch --> Increment[/"updated += 500"/]
    Increment --> Print[/"print(f'{abs(updated-count)} remaining. updated {updated}')"/]
    Print --> Loop
    Loop -->|False| End([End])
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class Secrets {
        +get_secret(name)
    }
    class FV_DB {
        +get_connection(config, DB_APP_NAME, autocommit)
        +get_cursor(conn)
    }
    class Cursor {
        +execute(sql)
        +fetchone()
    }
    class Main {
        +main()
    }
    class EntityTable {
        <<table>>
        id
        state
        state_change_ts
    }
    class TempStateTable {
        <<table>>
        id
        state_change_ts_temp
    }
    Main --> Secrets : uses
    Main --> FV_DB : uses
    FV_DB --> Cursor : provides
    Cursor --> EntityTable : queries/updates
    Cursor --> TempStateTable : inserts/deletes
```
